findingsSummary: Arjun Sharma has a strong backend development profile with well-evidenced Node.js and PostgreSQL skills. GitHub activity shows consistent open-source contributions. Minor gap found between claimed 5 years of experience and account age. Certificate metadata appears clean.

semanticMatches.notes: Found 240+ commits with Express routing, middleware, and async patterns across 3 repositories.
Strong evidence in hooks, context, and Redux integration. Component architecture is mature.
Found complex SQL migrations, indexing strategies, and Prisma ORM usage.
End-to-end typed codebase with generics, utility types, and strict mode enabled.
Dockerfile and docker-compose present but limited production deployment evidence.
Claimed on resume but no infrastructure-as-code or deployment scripts found in repositories.

contradictions: Resume claims 5 years of professional experience but GitHub account is only 3 years old.
AWS expertise claimed but no cloud configuration files found in any public repository.

riskIndicators.description: Account age of 3 years does not corroborate the claimed 5 years of experience. Consider asking for private repo access or employment records.
AWS claim has zero GitHub evidence. Candidate may have enterprise-only cloud experience not visible in public repositories.
